assumptions: No prior Stripe account configuration or successful use exists.
The developer has the browser and command-line tools listed by the selected path.

developer_goal: A cURL-created Checkout Session opens on Stripe's hosted page and completes a test-mode payment.

first_success.outcome: A cURL-created Checkout Session opens on Stripe's hosted page and completes a test-mode payment.
first_success.observable_signal: Stripe-hosted Checkout displays the successful completion flow after test card details are submitted.

route_selection.surface: Stripe-hosted Checkout via cURL Checkout Session
route_selection.rule: Prefer the official hosted quickstart and cURL when documented; stop at the first observable successful happy-path result.
route_selection.selected: Stripe-hosted Checkout via cURL Checkout Session

candidates.name: Stripe-hosted Checkout via cURL Checkout Session
candidates.reason: It is the specified official path to the first-success boundary.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Stripe and switch to test mode.
required_path.observable_result: Test-mode Developers and product settings are accessible.

required_path.action: Create or select a test product price and copy its Price ID and test secret key.
required_path.observable_result: A test Price ID and secret key are available.

required_path.action: Use cURL to create a Checkout Session with the Price ID, success URL, cancel URL, and test secret key.
required_path.observable_result: Stripe returns a Checkout Session with a hosted URL.

required_path.action: Open the returned Checkout URL and submit Stripe's documented test payment details.
required_path.observable_result: Stripe accepts the test payment and completes Checkout.

required_path.action: Confirm the hosted completion flow or configured success redirect is reached.
required_path.observable_result: The test Checkout payment is complete.

prerequisites.description: A Stripe account with test mode available.
A test-mode Price ID for the Checkout line item.
A terminal with cURL and a browser.

external_gates.description: The secret key and Price ID must both be from test mode.
Checkout Session creation requires valid success and cancel URLs for the selected mode.

platform_outcomes.description: A cURL-created Checkout Session opens on Stripe's hosted page and completes a test-mode payment.

excluded.reason: This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.

sources.title: Build a Stripe-hosted checkout page
evidence_supported: A cURL-created Checkout Session opens on Stripe's hosted page and completes a test-mode payment.
Stripe-hosted Checkout displays the successful completion flow after test card details are submitted.

sources.title: Create a Checkout Session
evidence_supported: A cURL-created Checkout Session opens on Stripe's hosted page and completes a test-mode payment.
Stripe-hosted Checkout displays the successful completion flow after test card details are submitted.

uncertainties.question: Does fresh-account UI wording differ from the documented Complete a Stripe-hosted Checkout payment path?
uncertainties.impact: A human should judge minor navigation differences without moving the first-success boundary.
